title: A rainy football match
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: Last Saturday, our football team played an important match against another school. It began to rain just before the game started, but the referee decided that we could still play. The ball moved quickly (27) the wet grass, which made the match more difficult. At first, the other team played better (28) us and scored an early goal. However, our coach told us not to give up. During the second half, we started passing the ball more carefully and created several chances. I was standing near the goal (29) my friend scored, so I saw everything clearly. Everyone shouted loudly, although we were all cold and wet. The final score was one-one, and our coach said he was proud (30) our effort. After the match, we went inside (31) get changed. I was tired, but I felt happy because we had worked well (32) a team.

questions.explanation: Infinitive of purpose: to get changed.
